episode.title: Frame the Decision: Pragmatic Threat Models

feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about security design, and I'm joined by Priya Nair, principal SRE at a payments platform. Priya Nair, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — I was last on the show talking about on-call rotations. The pattern shows up again here.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about security design, and I'm joined by Priya Nair, principal SRE at a payments platform. Priya Nair, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Frame the Decision: Pragmatic Threat Models
